Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}There is an informant at Club Escapade who will sell you {f 0 1 2}notes with URLs scrawled on them{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Entering the addresses on a public computer might reveal some secrets about the city.[n]{f 1 1}
